title: UiPath Full Year 2024 Earnings: Beats Expectations
text: UiPath (NYSE: PATH) reported strong full-year 2024 results that exceeded analyst expectations. Revenue: $1.31 billion, representing 24% growth from fiscal 2023. Net Loss: $89.9 million, a 73% improvement from the prior year. EPS: Loss of $0.16 per share, significantly better than the $0.60 loss in FY 2023. The company exceeded analyst estimates by 1.7% on revenue and surpassed analyst estimates by 30% on earnings per share. All revenue came from the Software Tools segment. Sales & Marketing represented the largest operating expense at $707.6 million (55% of total expenses). Non-operating gains of $72.2 million contributed positively to earnings. UiPath projects revenue growth averaging 15% annually over the next three years, outpacing the 12% forecasted growth for the broader U.S. software industry. Shares declined 4.3% in the week following the earnings announcement.
